specDependsOnNote: Spec 096 BUILDS ON specs 088/089 (the open-knowledge model-switch validator + per-user store + precedence + parity) and 064 (the /ask agent loop) and extends them provider-agnostically WITHOUT amending them. Spec 044 is listed as specIntegratesWith: 096 reuses its claim-bound actor_user_id binding for per-user model selection, read-only. The analyst phase consumes these surfaces read-only; full-delivery wiring lands in a later run.

executionHistory.summary: Created specs/096-multi-provider-model-connections/. Authored spec.md (analyst phase only — no design/scopes/implementation). Problem Statement grounded in 6 verified current-state facts: single global llm: provider (config/smackerel.yaml L80-88; binary Validate() in internal/config/config.go); 3 dispatch paths with inconsistent provider-awareness (ml/app/synthesis.py + drive_classify.py provider-aware; ml/app/routes/chat.py::_dispatch_live HARDCODED ollama_chat/{model}+OLLAMA_URL, no api_key, no provider branch — the primary gap); runtime model-switch exists but Ollama-only (specs 088/089: modelswitch/allowlist.go pure-leaf validator, telegram/model_command.go, api/agent_model.go, one-validator/one-store + per-request>sticky>default precedence); no discovery (/api/tags healthcheck/test-pull only); no web UI for connection setup; secrets operator-global via SST/env, NO reversible per-user vault. Captured the CONFIRMED operator-global (NOT per-user BYOK) decision in Problem Statement, Outcome Contract Hard Constraints, Non-Goals, and Domain Capability Model (single shared graph — no user_id in artifacts/topics/people/edges; connectors already operator-global; per-user layer limited to modelpref selection + per_user_monthly_budget_usd). Three capability layers as Goals G1-G7 + FR-A*/B*/C*/X* + NFR-1..4: (A) multi-connection provider abstraction + provider-aware /ask; (B) web UI add/test/enable/disable + protected-at-rest secrets; (C) discovery aggregation into one provider-qualified catalog + unified selection via existing 088/089 validator/store/precedence. Outcome Contract (G070) populated with concrete Intent/Success Signal/7 Hard Constraints/Failure Condition. Domain Capability Model (AN5 — capability-first triggers apply: 6 provider kinds, adapter/connector pattern, shared Telegram+web surface) with primitives, per-provider connection-param table, variation axes, single-foundation justification, invariants. 21 representative Gherkin scenarios SCN-096-A01..A04 / W01..W05 / D01..D05 / G01..G06 covering every owner-requested case (operator adds+tests Anthropic; adds OpenAI/Foundry/Google/Bedrock; user lists combined list in Telegram + picks hosted; fail-loud on misconfig; budget enforcement on paid model; byte-for-byte no-override Ollama parity). Product Principle Alignment (BLOCKING): P4 Source-Qualified (provider-qualified ids), P8 Trust Through Transparency (model attribution), P1 Local-First (Ollama default, cloud optional), C8/NO-DEFAULTS fail-loud SST, P5/P6/P10 respected — no deviations. Release Train: next (mvp frozen for new specs per spec 095 precedent; flagsIntroduced []). Section 12 'Builds On 088/089 — parity invariants preserved' (one-validator/one-store, synthesis/gather fork, precedence, byte-for-byte no-override, closed-set validation). 6 Open Questions incl. OQ-1 (KEY: secret-storage fork — reversible encrypted-at-rest vault vs env-only; argon2id does NOT fit). Zero source/test/migration diffs. No promotion past in_progress.

Authored design.md (DESIGN phase only — no scopes/report/uservalidation/source/tests/migrations). Contract-grade depth from the analyst spec.md + cited committed code. RESOLVED OQ-1..OQ-4 and honored the owner's confirmed decisions: (1) operator-global connections (NO per-user BYOK; no user_id on connection/credential surfaces — consistent with the single shared graph + operator-global connectors); per-user limited to modelpref selection + USD budget. (2) Secret store = single-key AES-256-GCM AEAD in Postgres (migration 060 model_provider_connections), per-record 96-bit nonce + AAD(connection_id|kind|key_version), key_version for rotation, secret_redaction last-4 for display; argon2id explicitly FORBIDDEN (reversible-credential class like CARD_REWARDS_GCAL_CREDENTIALS, NOT the AUTH_AT_REST_HASHING_KEY verifier class); never-return-plaintext write-only credential API. Master key = LLM_PROVIDER_SECRET_MASTER_KEY managed secret (3-mirror secret_keys path), loaded fail-loud G028 (required iff any db-mode hosted connection declared; Ollama-only adds no new secret), never leaves the Go core; documented rotation (re-encrypt-all, key_version bump). (3) Go->sidecar seam: extended /llm/chat ChatRequest additively with provider/api_base/api_key/provider_params; redesigned ml/app/routes/chat.py _dispatch_live to adopt the synthesis.py provider fork (ollama branch byte-for-byte today; hosted branch composes litellm model + api_key); secrets scrubbed from sidecar errors/logs; per-request transmission means no static provider secret on the sidecar. OQ-2 discovery: CatalogAggregator + per-kind adapters (Ollama live /api/tags, hosted SST-curated models[]), SST cache_ttl_ms + per_provider_timeout_ms (fail-loud, no default), typed ProviderDiscoveryStatus per effective-enabled connection (never silently dropped), stale-while-revalidate graceful degradation. OQ-3 budget: model-aware CostFn from SST llm.model_costs (ollama=$0 non-consuming; missing rate for a paid model = fail-loud refusal, never silent $0) + new model_usage_ledger (monthly per-user/global USD spend) making the existing agent.go pre-flight load-bearing before billable dispatch. OQ-4 grammar: <kind>/<backend-model-id> split on FIRST '/', at-most-one-enabled-connection-per-kind => deterministic (connection, backend id); canonicalization at the agenttool resolver boundary normalizes bare 089-era Ollama ids to ollama/<id> so the pure modelswitch leaf stays stdlib-only (admissible set INJECTED at construction, never imported). Two-plane SST-registry/DB-credential model reconciles Config-SST topology with web-UI-entered keys. Preserved ALL 088/089 invariants (one validator/one store, pure leaf, synthesis-vs-gather fork, per-request>sticky>default precedence, byte-for-byte no-override Ollama path, closed-set typed rejection, attribution) mapped 1:1 in a dedicated section; envelope/profile co-residence check scoped to ollama/-kind entries (provider-agnostic extension, not a 088/089 amendment). Web operator surface data contract specified (GET/PUT/POST /v1/admin/model-connections*, operator-gated, redacted reads); UI pixels/flow (OQ-5/OQ-6) deferred to bubbles.ux. Complexity Tracking + Testing Strategy (live-stack authentic, ephemeral test master key, mandatory negative coverage) + planned Trace Topology included. Status stays in_progress (no promotion). FLAGGED for bubbles.analyst: state.json.specDependsOn has two inaccurate directory pointers (specs/088-open-knowledge-model-switching -> specs/088-runtime-switchable-models; specs/089-gather-turn-model-switching -> specs/089-runtime-model-hotswap-persistent-selection); spec.md body already cites correct paths.

Appended the UX phase to spec.md (single-file, NO sidecar): four level-2 sections — ## UI Scenario Matrix, ## UX Specification, ## UI Wireframes, ## User Flows. RESOLVED the two ux-owned open questions. OQ-5 (picker capability surfacing, BOTH surfaces): group by provider (Ollama/local group first), provider-qualified ids verbatim (ollama/…, anthropic/…, azure/<deployment>, …); preserved the 088/089 'current' / 'system default' tag vocabulary AND the Telegram numbered-reply selection mechanic (model_command.go) verbatim; UNREACHABLE provider = shown-but-disabled, never hidden (Principle 8) with its typed ProviderDiscoveryStatus, numbering/selection covers ONLY reachable models so a chosen number/option always maps to a dispatchable model, and a persisted current selection on a now-down provider is NOT silently reset (it fails loud at /ask, never an Ollama fallback — FR-X1/G01); cost surfacing = per-group cost class (free·local vs paid) + a pull-triggered (never pushed) paid-model cost note + a budget line shown only when a paid model is in the catalog (Principle 6 pull-not-push, Principle 7 phone-fit); capability surfacing = tool-capable prominent (088/089 gather-turn relevance), context/vision compact. Telegram + web are behavior-parallel (same combined catalog, same order, ONE validator + ONE store, per-request>sticky>default precedence — SCN-096-D03/G06). OQ-6 (operator web connection-setup flow): a three-page PWA triad matching the existing connectors convention (connectors.html → connectors-add.html → connector-detail.html) — S1 list (every SST-declared slot + status: kind, enabled/disabled, last-tested pass/fail + when, secret presence + last-4, model count), S2 add/configure (pick a declared-but-unconfigured db-mode slot → enter that kind's write-only secret fields, with non-secret params shown read-only from the SST registry, honoring the design two-plane model and surfacing that a brand-new provider KIND is an SST/config edit), S3 detail (status banner, Test connection with a TRUTHFUL typed pass/fail that never reports false success and never substitutes Ollama — SCN-096-W04, Enable 409-guarded on credential-present AND last-test-ok, Disable, and a Replace-credential write-only rotation that clears last-test → re-test required). Operator-only boundary made VISIBLE: the triad is operator-gated, not in the user nav, and a non-operator hitting it gets a 403 operator-only notice with no secrets and no setup. Binding Write-Only Secret Affordance Contract in every credential wireframe: display = presence + last-4 + last-tested only; input = type=password, autocomplete=off, empty on load, never pre-filled, never echoed; rotation = enter-a-new-value; NO reveal/copy/decrypt control anywhere (master key never leaves the Go core). Authored 5 screens (S1–S5) with mobile+desktop ASCII wireframes, per-kind credential matrix (Ollama/Anthropic/OpenAI/Azure-Foundry/Google-Vertex+Gemini/Bedrock), failed-test + unreachable + paid-confirm + off-catalog-rejection states; a UX9 UI Primitives inventory (provider group, reachability status pill, selectable vs disabled model row, write-only credential field, read-only SST param list, test-outcome banner, cost confirmation, budget line) with consumers + composition rules + a11y/responsive constraints; per-element interaction states; and Accessibility (role=radiogroup/status/alert, aria-busy, aria-disabled+out-of-tab-order for unreachable rows, focus order, ≥44px targets, color-never-the-only-signal, phone-screen-fit) matched to the live PWA aria conventions. Every UX journey traced to SCN-096-W01..W05 + D01..D05 + G01/G03/G04/G05. CONSUMED the design-owned data contract (/v1/admin/model-connections* admin endpoints, /v1/agent/model selection view, ModelCatalog + ProviderDiscoveryStatus shapes) WITHOUT redesigning it. Residual questions routed to design/plan: (a) the /v1/agent/model view needs additive enrichment — per-entry capabilities[] + cost_class, and an optional month-to-date budget field — to render the cost/capability hints + budget line (design anticipated capability enrichment in design §6.4; UX extends it to cost+budget); (b) the operator-gate mechanism (SST infrastructure.operator_user_ids allowlist vs the live webAuthMiddleware subject) per design §11.4/§18; (c) whether the gather-turn picker hard-filters non-tool-capable models or shows-but-disables them (mirrors the unreachable decision); (d) four new PWA surfaces to be built by implement — model-connections.html, model-connection-add.html, model-connection-detail.html, model-picker.html. Did NOT write scopes.md/report.md/uservalidation.md/scenario-manifest.json, NO source/test/migration edits, and did NOT touch certification.* / specDependsOn / other agents' fields. artifact-lint will still report scopes.md/report.md/uservalidation.md/scenario-manifest.json missing — expected at this phase; bubbles.plan owns them next.

Authored scopes.md as one coherent 7-scope full-delivery plan (SCOPE-01..07), written across a two-part split to keep each planning turn bounded (Part 1: SCOPE-01..04 + header/Execution Outline/Scope Table; Part 2 this dispatch: replaced the Continuation stub with full SCOPE-05/06/07, added Scope-Table rows 5-7, added After-SCOPE-05/06/07 validation checkpoints, and a Sequential Gate Summary). scenario-manifest.json (20 scenarios SCN-096-A01..G06 over SCOPE-01..07) was already present and is AUTHORITATIVE — every linkedTests entry in scopes.md is copied verbatim and the manifest was NOT modified. Each scope carries a Test Plan (scenario -> concrete manifest test; unit/integration/e2e-api categories) + a tiered DoD (Tier-1 universal + Tier-2 role-specific), all unchecked (implementation pending). Resolved the four residual decisions design.md handed to plan: R1 operator-gate mechanism -> SCOPE-06 (SST infrastructure.operator_user_ids allowlist over the existing internal/auth bearer/session subject; fail-loud when empty while a connection-mutating endpoint is reachable; 403 non-operator / 401 anonymous; pinned by TestAdminModelConnections_OperatorGate_403NonOperator_401Anonymous_Spec096); R2 additive GET /v1/agent/model enrichment (capabilities[] + cost_class + optional MTD budget) preserving allowed_models[] byte-for-byte for 089 clients -> SCOPE-07; R3 non-tool-capable gather selection shown-but-disabled + rejected fail-loud (disable-vs-filter justified, consistent with the unreachable-provider treatment) -> SCOPE-07; R4 model-aware CostFn signature blast-radius on the existing 064/087 USD-budget tests -> SCOPE-05 (DoD re-run checkitem). DAG: SCOPE-01 (foundation) -> 02 -> 03 -> 04 (01 + the SCOPE-03 dispatch seam); SCOPE-05 dep 04; SCOPE-06 dep 02+04; SCOPE-07 dep 04+06. Live hosted-provider e2e-api legs (SCOPE-03/04/06/07: real Anthropic/OpenAI reachability, live Ollama, GPU answers) are deferred to a downstream bubbles.devops home-lab dispatch (C7 terminal posture) — nextRequiredOwner after implement+test. This dispatch wrote scopes.md SCOPE-05/06/07 + the state bookkeeping only; certification.scopeProgress populated SCOPE-01..07 not_started; no promotion past in_progress.

Implemented SCOPE-01 (Provider-connection registry + config SST schema) ONLY — SCN-096-A01/A04/G02. Added the operator-global llm.connections[] registry + llm.discovery + llm.model_costs[] SST to config/smackerel.yaml (ADDITIVE; the existing llm.provider Ollama-only path is byte-for-byte retained; local-ollama enabled, anthropic/openai/azure-foundry/google/bedrock declared-but-disabled with NO committed secrets). Declared LLM_PROVIDER_SECRET_MASTER_KEY in all 3 secret-key mirrors (yaml infrastructure.secret_keys + internal/config/secret_keys.go + scripts/commands/config.sh SHELL_SECRET_KEYS, appended last; updated the pinned TestSecretKeysMirror want-list). Wired the pipeline (scripts/commands/config.sh): LLM_CONNECTIONS_JSON (per-kind params/models as inline-JSON strings per the ML_MODEL_MEMORY_PROFILES_JSON SST-JSON precedent), LLM_DISCOVERY_CACHE_TTL_MS/PER_PROVIDER_TIMEOUT_MS scalars, LLM_MODEL_COSTS_JSON, + the master-key placeholder block mirroring AUTH_AT_REST_HASHING_KEY. New internal/config/model_connections.go: typed domain (ModelConnection{ID,Kind,Enabled,Params map[string]any,SecretRef{Mode,EnvKey},Models{Strategy,List}}, ModelDiscoveryConfig, ModelCost) + LoadModelConnections + closed-set fail-loud Validate(secretKeys): unknown kind, missing required per-kind param (named conn+param), discovery bound <=0 (named, no default), env-mode secret_ref.env_key not in secret_keys (named), enabled non-ollama model with no model_costs entry (named, never $0). Wired into config.go::Load (self-validating like LoadOpenKnowledge); extended setRequiredEnv so all Load()-based tests stay green. New internal/config/model_connections_test.go: the 7 manifest-named tests, spec-driven + non-tautological adversarial (each mutation paired with a passing control). EVIDENCE (report.md#scope-01): ./smackerel.sh config generate (dev+test) EXIT 0 with the registry + master key present in both generated env files; ./smackerel.sh check EXIT 0 (build+vet+config-sync+scenario-lint); the 7 spec-096 tests + TestSecretKeys_MirrorsYAMLManifest + TestSecretKeysMirror PASS; NO-DEFAULTS grep clean; gofmt clean on changed files; 088/089 selection surfaces (modelswitch/modelpref/telegram model_command/api agent_model) UNTOUCHED. SCOPE-01 status in_progress: 10/12 DoD met; 2 environmental/foreign residuals routed to owners — D01-T1-3 (format --check) blocked solely by a pre-existing untracked FOREIGN file internal/connector/qfdecisions/chaos_hardening_test.go (another session's WIP, must not modify), D01-T1-1 (artifact-lint) blocked solely by missing uservalidation.md (bubbles.plan-owned). NO push, NO framework-validate, NO full suite (scoped per dispatch). Other scopes (02..07) untouched.

Recorded SCOPE-02 (Encrypted credential vault + master-key lifecycle, SCN-096-W05). Code was already implemented + verified in a prior dispatch that was cut off before writing artifacts; this turn wrote evidence + DoD + state ONLY (NO source/migration/test/config edits, NO push, NO long suites/framework-validate). Shipped (reviewed, not edited): connvault.SecretVault (internal/assistant/openknowledge/connvault/vault.go, NEW pkg) — AES-256-GCM AEAD via crypto/aes + cipher.NewGCM, per-record random 96-bit nonce, AAD = connection_id:provider_kind:secret_key_version, master key scrubbed (zero(raw)) after cipher build, VaultRecord carries only ciphertext+nonce+key_version+last-4 redaction (NO plaintext field), NewSecretVault fail-loud (base64 + exactly-32-byte + positive epoch), LoadVault requires the master key iff a db-mode connection is declared (Ollama-only adds no secret), Rotate bumps key_version + re-encrypts; reversible-not-hashed (argon2id explicitly FORBIDDEN in the doc-comment — the reversible managed-secret class). Persistence: migration 061_model_provider_connections.sql (operator-global, NO actor_user_id, app-written enabled/updated_at, no DB-side defaults) + tests/integration/model_connections_vault_test.go. EVIDENCE (report.md SCOPE-02): ./smackerel.sh test unit --go --go-run SecretVault EXIT 0 — 6/6 unit tests pass (EncryptDecrypt_RoundTrip, NeverReturnsPlaintext_RedactionLast4, AADTamperRejected, WrongKeyRejected, MasterKeyFailLoud [5 subtests incl 2 CONTROL], Rotation_ReEncryptsToNewEpoch), connvault ok 0.044s; ./smackerel.sh check EXIT 0 (Config in sync with SST, env_file drift guard OK, scenario-lint OK); grep proves 0 actual one-way hash usages (the 2 argon2 hits are doc-comment prose L23-24) + AES-256-GCM primitive present + connvault references NO modelswitch/modelpref/picker (088/089 untouched, additive). DoD: 7 of 12 [x] (T1-2 check, T1-4 real-evidence, T1-5 088/089-additive, T2-2 secret-safety, T2-3 reversible-not-hashed, T2-4 AEAD-adversarial, T2-5 master-key-fail-loud). DEFERRED [ ]: T2-1 migration-apply + T2-6 integration-isolation + T2-7 integration-test (the 1 integration test TestVault_PersistRoundTripTestMasterKey_Spec096 skips without DATABASE_URL — deferred to a clean-stack run to avoid OOM/contention on the shared test stack); T1-1 artifact-lint (absent uservalidation.md, a validation/closeout artifact owned by bubbles.plan) + T1-3 format --check (blocked by a pre-existing foreign untracked file internal/connector/qfdecisions/chaos_hardening_test.go; SCOPE-02 files gofmt-clean). Also corrected the stale 'migration 060' references in scopes.md SCOPE-02 to '061' (the actual committed file). SCOPE-02 held at in_progress (integration leg + 2 foreign items pending); top-level status unchanged at in_progress; SCOPE-01 progress, certifiedAt, certification.status, specDependsOn untouched.

Implemented SCOPE-03 (Provider-aware /ask dispatch, the credential seam) - SCN-096-A02/A03/G01/G04/G05. Additive Go llm.ChatRequest (client.go) += Provider/APIBase/APIKey/ProviderParams (all omitempty; a zero-value request is byte-for-byte the pre-096 wire shape) + Python ChatRequest (ml/app/schemas.py) += the same four optional fields with extra=forbid kept. Redesigned ml/app/routes/chat.py _dispatch_live into the synthesis.py-style provider fork: ollama branch byte-for-byte today (model=ollama_chat/<model>, api_base from req.api_base or OLLAMA_URL, NO api_key) vs hosted branch (_compose_hosted_model <prefix>/<backend> + api_base + per-request cleartext api_key); a missing required key raises typed llm_misconfigured and NEVER substitutes Ollama; every hosted error/log routes through _scrub_secret (type(e).__name__ + provider + model, api_key substring redacted). NEW internal/assistant/openknowledge/llm/dispatch_resolver.go DispatchResolver: provider-qualified id -> SCOPE-01 registry connection -> SCOPE-02 SecretVault.Decrypt -> populated ChatRequest (BARE backend Model + Provider + APIBase + APIKey) + provider-qualified Attribution; not-effective-enabled / credential-missing / decrypt-failed -> typed *ResolveError, NEVER an Ollama fallback; logger-free (no key in logs); CredentialSource interface seam (SCOPE-06 supplies the DB-backed impl). Provider-qualified attribution: the existing 089 TurnResult.Model carries anthropic/claude-3-5-sonnet verbatim (additive, value-only). Tests (manifest-named): ml/tests/test_chat_dispatch_hosted_spec096.py (3), test_chat_dispatch_parity_spec096.py (2 ADVERSARIAL), test_chat_dispatch_secret_scrub_spec096.py (2 ADVERSARIAL); internal/.../llm/client_provider_test.go, dispatch_resolver_test.go; internal/.../agent/attribution_provider_test.go. EVIDENCE (report.md SCOPE-03): Go llm 4 tests / 11 subtests PASS (ok 0.013s) + agent TestAttribution_ProviderQualified anthropic+openai PASS (ok 0.026s) in golang:1.25.10-bookworm; the sanctioned ./smackerel.sh test unit --go --go-run finished OK exit 0 (no 088/089 collateral). Python 7/7 PASS (0.45s, NO skips) in python:3.12-slim with pip install -e ./ml[dev] (litellm injected via sys.modules - it is in the runtime extra, not [dev], matching the repo's other LLM tests). Captured RED-before: scrub no-op + ollama api_key leak -> 3 adversarial tests FAIL (parity x2 + error-detail scrub); test_api_key_never_logged stays GREEN (the log line never carries the key); both mutations reverted, post-revert GREEN restored. Regression: test_tool_roundtrip 11 passed (pre-096 chat contract intact). DoD: 7 of 11 [x] (T1-4 real-evidence + T2-1 parity + T2-2 additive + T2-3 secret-safety + T2-4 fail-loud-never-ollama + T2-5 attribution + T2-6 RED-before); deferred: T1-1 artifact-lint (foreign uservalidation.md), T1-2 check + T1-3 format (orchestrator closeout), T2-7 integration + e2e-api live-stack legs (clean-stack bubbles.devops dispatch). Findings for SCOPE-06: it owns the DB write that persists the encrypted VaultRecord and the production CredentialSource impl feeding this resolver, and should gate effective-enabled on last_test_outcome=ok. 088/089 selection surfaces untouched (additive seam only). NO source/state promotion past in_progress; NO check/format/framework-validate/push this turn.

Implemented SCOPE-04 (Model discovery + unified catalog + identifier canonicalization) - SCN-096-D01/D04. NEW pure-Go internal/assistant/openknowledge/catalog/ package (catalog.go types, adapter.go, aggregator.go, canonical.go) + the two manifest-named test files (aggregator_test.go, canonical_test.go). Per-kind discovery adapters: OllamaAdapter probes live GET <base_url>/api/tags via an injected HTTPDoer -> ollama/<name> descriptors (free/local; optional operator capability hint since /api/tags carries no caps); HostedAdapter serves a connection SST-curated models[] from the SCOPE-01 registry verbatim (id <kind>/<backend>, capabilities carried). CatalogAggregator runs adapters in parallel bounded by SST per_provider_timeout_ms, merges the reachable subset into ONE provider-qualified ModelCatalog (id+connection_id+kind+capabilities), ALWAYS emits one typed ProviderDiscoveryStatus per adapter (ok|unreachable|timeout|auth_failed|disabled) so a down provider degrades gracefully (models absent) and is NEVER silently dropped; last-good cached for SST cache_ttl_ms; both bounds fail-loud >0 at construction (G028, no hardcoded default). canonical.go: SplitQualified (first-/ split, backend may contain / and :), Canonicalize (bare 089 Ollama id -> ollama/<id> iff installed), CatalogResolver INJECTS the catalog as the EXISTING modelswitch.Allowlist admissible set (Validate -> Resolve; off-catalog -> SAME modelswitch.Rejection, NO modelpref store write, NO dispatch). modelswitch stays a pure stdlib leaf (imports only fmt/log/slog/strings; catalog imports the leaf, never the reverse) - 088/089 validator/store/precedence unchanged, additive admissible-set SOURCE only. EVIDENCE (report.md SCOPE-04): catalog package GREEN via ./smackerel.sh test unit --go --go-run with the scoped Spec096 regex (UNIT_EXIT=0, ok catalog 0.097s) - 6 tests incl 2 ADVERSARIAL (graceful-degradation typed-status-never-dropped across unreachable/auth_failed/timeout; off-catalog typed rejection + no-store-write control); captured RED-before (RED_EXIT=1) for both adversarial tests via injected silent-drop + accept-any regressions, reverted to identical GREEN; leaf-purity import grep. DoD: 7 of 11 [x] (T1-4 real-evidence, T2-1 graceful-degradation, T2-2 leaf-purity, T2-3 one-validator/store, T2-4 fail-loud SST, T2-5 canonicalization+off-catalog, T2-6 RED-before); T2-7 partial (unit pass no skips; live integration model_discovery_test.go + e2e-api deferred to clean-stack bubbles.devops dispatch); T1-1 artifact-lint (absent uservalidation.md, bubbles.plan), T1-2 check + T1-3 format deferred to the orchestrator. NO push, NO framework-validate, NO check/full-suite this turn. Top-level status stays in_progress; no other scope progress / certifiedAt / specDependsOn / certification.status touched.

scopeProgress.name: Model-aware CostFn + load-bearing USD budget enforcement
Combined catalog selection across Telegram + web, 088/089 parity

statusDiscipline.scopePickupRule: All dependsOn scopes must be Done. Pick the lowest-numbered eligible scope.
statusDiscipline.specDoneRequires: All scopes done. certification.completedScopes contains all scope IDs and bubbles.validate has certified promotion.

notes: Analyst-phase bootstrap (2026-06-18). spec.md + state.json only; design.md / scopes.md / report.md / uservalidation.md / scenario-manifest.json are intentionally absent until the downstream chain (design -> ux -> plan) runs. artifact-lint will report those as missing required artifacts — expected at this phase. No promotion past in_progress.
